request_payload.exposure_text: As a former civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how vital community preparedness is for national security. The current system isn't just about protecting us from threats—it's about empowering citizens to take responsibility. Studies show that well-prepared communities reduce strain on emergency services and enhance overall resilience. We can't afford to ignore this. #CivilDefenseMatters #NationalSecurity
